title: Governance, Cooperation and Territoriality: comparing value chains and connections to tourism across six European mountain areas
description: A practice abstract from the Horizon 2020-funded MOVING project that compares governance, cooperation, and territoriality in relation to tourism value chains across six European mountain regions. It aims to identify key factors contributing to the sustainability and resilience of mountain landscapes by examining the roles of actors, institutions, collaboration, and investment in tourism.
